global.description: The ad features a full canvas background with the VantaStyle logo positioned at the top left. The main subject includes a prominent headline stating 'Limited stock' and body text that reads 'Free shipping over $25', both centered in the middle of the ad. A call to action button labeled 'Shop now' is located at the bottom center. Discount badges indicating '30%' and 'SALE' are placed at the bottom left and top right, respectively. The layout is complemented by decorative segmented shapes on the left and right sides.
global.visual_style: Modern design with vibrant colors and clear typography
global.main_message: Limited stock with free shipping offers

elements.label: VantaStyle text logo
elements.description: The logo of the VantaStyle app, positioned at the top left corner of the ad.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: Supporting descriptive text below the headline.

elements.label: Call to Action
elements.description: A button with the text 'Shop now', positioned prominently to encourage user action.

elements.label: Discount Badge
elements.description: A small rectangular badge displaying the discount percentage, located in the lower left corner of the ad crop.

elements.label: Sale Badge
elements.description: A yellow rectangular badge with the word 'SALE' prominently displayed.

elements.label: Segmented shape
elements.description: A segmented rectangular shape with a diagonal line, positioned centrally within the crop.

elements.label: Segmented crop of a decorative element
elements.description: A purple rectangular shape with a diagonal line, possibly part of a larger design element.

elements.label: Segmented crop of a shape
elements.description: A segmented crop showing a rectangular shape with a diagonal line, likely part of a larger design element.

embedding_texts.global_text: Mobile ad for VantaStyle Drops promoting limited stock and free shipping.
